message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="team-lead" summary="All done, shutting down team">
All work complete. Great session — the Driver-Reviewer model worked well, zero concurrent edit conflicts. The consensus-before-push pipeline is now codified. Shutting down the team. Thank you all.
</teammate-message>

input.content:
Good session. Five commits reviewed, all clean -- no Rust regressions, no test gaps, no production-readiness concerns. The Driver-Reviewer model eliminated the concurrent edit problems we had before. 

One item for the backlog: the HTMX inline edit validation error path does not surface error messages in the `TodoItemEditTemplate` (flagged in my Task #5 review). Low priority given client-side `maxlength` and `required` mitigate it.

Ready to shut down.
input.summary: Session wrap-up, ready to shut down

routing.summary: Session wrap-up, ready to shut down
